title: agrostis argentea
intro: Agrostis argentea, also known as silver bent or silver bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, North America, and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agrostis argentea include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of Agrostis argentea typically involve infusion or decoction of the leaves and stems, which can be used as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
